title: ophrys densiflora
intro: Ophrys densiflora, also known as the Spiranthes densiflora or the dense-flowered ladies' tresses, is a species of orchid native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys densiflora include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Ophrys densiflora can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
